scripts.test: env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 zsh -c 'find tests \( -name "*.test.ts" -o -name "*.test.tsx" \) ! -name "headless-cli-exit.test.ts" ! -name "headless-runner.test.ts" -print0 | xargs -0 -n 10 -P 2 bun test --reporter=dots --preload ../../packages/tooling/src/test-log-preload.ts --preload ./node_modules/@opentui/solid/scripts/preload.ts'
scripts.test:e2e: env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 bun test --reporter=dots --preload ./node_modules/@opentui/solid/scripts/preload.ts integration tests/headless-cli-exit.test.ts tests/headless-runner.test.ts
